revision.text:
大伴宿奈麻呂（おおとものすくなまろ、生没年不詳）は、[[大伴安麻呂]]の三男。母は不詳。[[田村大嬢]]・[[坂上大嬢]]・[[坂上二嬢]]の父。
724(神亀1)年より以前、宮仕えする恋人に対する歌があり、万葉にはこの２首のみ残る。おそらく727(神亀4)年頃までに亡くなったと思われる。

revision.comment: ロボットによる 追加: [[zh:大伴宿奈麻呂]]
revision.text:
大伴宿奈麻呂（おおとものすくなまろ、生没年不詳）は、[[大伴安麻呂]]の三男。母は不詳。[[田村大嬢]]・[[坂上大嬢]]・[[坂上二嬢]]の父。
724(神亀1)年より以前、宮仕えする恋人に対する歌があり、[[万葉]]にはこの2首のみ残る。おそらく727(神亀4)年頃までに亡くなったと思われる。
[[category:奈良時代の人物|おおとものすくなまろ]] {{japanese-history-stub|おおとものすくなまろ}}
[[zh:大伴宿奈麻呂]]

大伴宿奈麻呂（おおとものすくなまろ、生没年不詳）は、[[大伴安麻呂]]の三男。母は不詳。[[田村大嬢]]・[[坂上大嬢]]・[[坂上二嬢]]の父。
724（神亀1）年より以前、宮仕えする恋人に対する歌があり、[[万葉]]にはこの2首のみ残る。おそらく727（神亀4）年頃までに亡くなったと思われる。
[[category:奈良時代の人物|おおとものすくなまろ]] {{japanese-history-stub|おおとものすくなまろ}}
[[zh:大伴宿奈麻呂]]

大伴宿奈麻呂（おおとものすくなまろ、生没年不詳）は、[[大伴安麻呂]]の三男。母は不詳。[[田村大嬢]]・[[坂上大嬢]]・[[坂上二嬢]]の父。
724（神亀1）年より以前、宮仕えする恋人に対する歌があり、[[万葉集]]にはこの2首のみ残る。おそらく727（神亀4）年頃までに亡くなったと思われる。
[[category:奈良時代の人物|おおとものすくなまろ]] {{japanese-history-stub|おおとものすくなまろ}}
[[zh:大伴宿奈麻呂]]

大伴宿奈麻呂（おおとものすくなまろ、生没年不詳）は、[[大伴安麻呂]]の三男。母は不詳。[[田村大嬢]]・[[坂上大嬢]]・[[坂上二嬢]]の父。
724（神亀1）年より以前、宮仕えする恋人に対する歌があり、[[万葉集]]にはこの2首のみ残る。おそらく727（神亀4）年頃までに亡くなったと思われる。
[[category:奈良時代の人物|おおとものすくなまろ]] {{japanese-history-stub|おおとものすくなまろ}} [[Category:大伴氏｜すくなまろ]]
[[zh:大伴宿奈麻呂]]

'''大伴宿奈麻呂'''（おおとものすくなまろ、生没年不詳）は、[[奈良時代]]前期の[[官人]]。[[カバネ|姓]]は[[宿禰]]。[[大納言]][[大伴安麻呂]]の三男。母は不詳。兄弟に[[大伴旅人]]・[[大伴田主]]・[[大伴稲公]]がおり、異母妹の[[大伴坂上郎女]]を妻にした。[[田村大嬢]]（大伴稲公室）・[[坂上大嬢]]（[[大伴家持]]室）・[[坂上二嬢]]（[[大伴駿河麻呂]]室）の父。
[[和銅]]元年（[[708年]]）1月、[[従五位上]]に叙せられる。和銅4年5月、[[近衛府|左衛士督]]になる。[[養老]]3年（[[719年]]）7月には[[備前国|備前]]守在任中であったが[[安芸国]]・[[周防国]]の[[按察使]]に任ぜられる。[[神亀]]元年（[[724年]]）、[[従四位下]]に昇叙。
神亀元年（724年）より以前、宮仕えする恋人に対する歌があり、『[[万葉集]]』にはこの2首のみ残る。没年は不詳だが、おそらく神亀4年（[[727年]]）頃までに亡くなったと思われる。また『万葉集』（4-759）によれば田村里（現在の[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]尼辻町）に住んでいたことが知られ、時に[[弁官|右大弁]]だった。
[[category:奈良時代の人物|おおとものすくなまろ]] {{japanese-history-stub|おおとものすくなまろ}} [[Category:大伴氏|すくなまろ]] [[Category:万葉歌人]]
[[zh:大伴宿奈麻呂]]

'''大伴宿奈麻呂'''（おおとも の すくなまろ、生没年不詳）は、[[奈良時代]]前期の[[官人]]。[[カバネ|姓]]は[[宿禰]]。[[大納言]][[大伴安麻呂]]の三男。母は不詳。兄弟に[[大伴旅人]]・[[大伴田主]]・[[大伴稲公]]がおり、異母妹の[[大伴坂上郎女]]を妻にした。[[田村大嬢]]（大伴稲公室）・[[坂上大嬢]]（[[大伴家持]]室）・[[坂上二嬢]]（[[大伴駿河麻呂]]室）の父。
[[和銅]]元年（[[708年]]）1月、[[従五位上]]に叙せられる。和銅4年5月、[[近衛府|左衛士督]]になる。[[養老]]3年（[[719年]]）7月には[[備前国|備前]]守在任中であったが[[安芸国]]・[[周防国]]の[[按察使]]に任ぜられる。[[神亀]]元年（[[724年]]）、[[従四位下]]に昇叙。
神亀元年（724年）より以前、宮仕えする恋人に対する歌があり、『[[万葉集]]』にはこの2首のみ残る。没年は不詳だが、おそらく神亀4年（[[727年]]）頃までに亡くなったと思われる。また『万葉集』（4-759）によれば田村里（現在の[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]尼辻町）に住んでいたことが知られ、時に[[弁官|右大弁]]だった。

[[zh:大伴宿奈麻呂]]

'''大伴 宿奈麻呂'''（おおとも の すくなまろ、生没年不詳）は、[[奈良時代]]前期の[[貴族]]。[[カバネ|姓]]は[[宿禰]]。[[大納言]]・[[大伴安麻呂]]の三男。[[官位]]は[[従四位|従四位下]]・[[弁官|右大弁]]。
== 経歴 == [[和銅]]元年（[[708年]]）1月[[従六位|従六位上]]から三階昇進して[[従五位|従五位下]]に叙せられる。その後順調に昇進し、和銅5年（[[712年]]）従五位上、[[霊亀]]3年（[[717年]]）[[正五位|正五位下]]、養老4年（[[720年]]）正五位上、[[神亀]]元年（[[724年]]）[[従四位|従四位下]]に至る。またこの間、和銅8年（[[715年]]）[[近衛府|左衛士督]]、[[養老]]3年（[[719年]]）7月には[[備前国|備前]]守在任中であったが[[安芸国]]・[[周防国]]の[[按察使]]に任ぜられている。
神亀元年（724年）より以前、宮仕えする恋人に対する歌があり、『[[万葉集]]』にはこの2首のみ残る。没年は不詳だが、おそらく神亀4年（[[727年]]）頃までに亡くなったと思われる。また『万葉集』（4-759）によれば田村里（現在の[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]尼辻町）に住んでいたことが知られ、時に[[弁官|右大弁]]だった。

revision.comment: 官歴セクションの追加、経歴セクション推敲、出典補記
revision.text:
'''大伴 宿奈麻呂'''（おおとも の すくなまろ、[[生没年不詳]]）は、[[奈良時代]]前期の[[貴族]]。[[大納言]]・[[大伴安麻呂]]の三男。[[官位]]は[[従四位|従四位下]]・[[弁官|右大弁]]。
== 経歴 == [[元明天皇|元明]]朝の[[和銅]]元年（[[708年]]）[[従六位|従六位上]]から三階昇進して[[従五位|従五位下]]に叙せられる。その後、和銅5年（[[712年]]）従五位上、[[霊亀]]3年（[[717年]]）[[正五位|正五位下]]、[[養老]]4年（[[720年]]）正五位上と元明朝から[[元正天皇|元正]]朝にかけて順調に昇進する。またこの間、和銅8年（[[715年]]）[[近衛府|左衛士督]]、養老3年（[[719年]]）7月には[[備前国#国司|備前守]]在任中であったが、[[安芸国]]・[[周防国]]の[[按察使]]に任ぜられている。
[[神亀]]元年（[[724年]]）[[聖武天皇]]の[[即位]]後間もなく[[従四位|従四位下]]に叙せられた。没年は不詳だが、おそらく神亀4年（[[727年]]）頃までに亡くなったと想定される。
神亀元年（724年）より以前、宮仕えする恋人に対する歌があり、『[[万葉集]]』にはこの2首のみ残る。また『万葉集』（4-759）によれば田村里（現在の[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]尼辻町）に住んでいたことが知られ、時に[[弁官|右大弁]]だった。
== 官歴 == 『[[続日本紀]]』による。 *時期不詳：[[従六位|従六位上]] *[[和銅]]元年（[[708年]]） 正月11日：[[従五位|従五位下]]（越階）。 *和銅5年（[[712年]]） 正月19日：従五位上 *和銅8年（[[715年]]） 5月22日：[[近衛府|左衛士督]] *[[霊亀]]3年（[[717年]]） 正月4日：[[正五位|正五位下]] *[[養老]]3年（[[719年]]） 7月13日：[[安芸国]][[周防国]][[按察使]]、見[[備前国#国司|備前国守]] *養老4年（[[720年]]） 正月11日：正五位上 *[[神亀]]元年（[[724年]]） 2月22日：[[従四位|従四位下]] *時期不詳：[[弁官|右大弁]]<ref>『万葉集』巻4-759</ref>
== 系譜 == *父：[[大伴安麻呂]] *母：不詳 *妻：[[大伴坂上郎女]] **女子：[[坂上大嬢]]（[[大伴家持]]室） **女子：[[坂上二嬢]]（[[大伴駿河麻呂]]室） *生母不詳の子女 **女子：[[田村大嬢]]（[[大伴稲公]]室）
== 脚注 == {{reflist}}
== 参考文献 == *[[宇治谷孟]]『続日本紀 （上）』[[講談社]]〈[[講談社学術文庫]]〉、1992年
{{DEFAULTSORT:おおとも の すくなまろ}} [[Category:奈良時代の貴族]] [[Category:大伴氏|すくなまろ]] [[Category:万葉歌人]] [[Category:7世紀生]] [[Category:8世紀没]]

'''大伴 宿奈麻呂'''（おおとも の すくなまろ、[[生没年不詳]]）は、[[奈良時代]]前期の[[貴族]]。[[大納言]]・[[大伴安麻呂]]の三男。[[官位]]は[[従四位|従四位下]]・[[弁官|右大弁]]。
== 経歴 == [[元明天皇|元明]]朝の[[和銅]]元年（[[708年]]）[[従六位|従六位上]]から三階昇進して[[従五位|従五位下]]に叙せられる。その後、和銅5年（[[712年]]）従五位上、[[霊亀]]3年（[[717年]]）[[正五位|正五位下]]、[[養老]]4年（[[720年]]）正五位上と元明朝から[[元正天皇|元正]]朝にかけて順調に昇進する。またこの間、和銅8年（[[715年]]）[[近衛府|左衛士督]]、養老3年（[[719年]]）7月には[[備前国#国司|備前守]]在任中であったが、[[安芸国]]・[[周防国]]の[[按察使]]に任ぜられている。
[[神亀]]元年（[[724年]]）[[聖武天皇]]の[[即位]]後間もなく[[従四位|従四位下]]に叙せられた。没年は不詳だが、おそらく神亀4年（[[727年]]）頃までに亡くなったと想定される。
神亀元年（724年）より以前、宮仕えする恋人に対する歌があり、『[[万葉集]]』にはこの2首が採録されている<ref>『万葉集』巻4-0532,0533）</ref>。また『万葉集』（4-759）によれば田村里（現在の[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]尼辻町）に住んでいたことが知られ、時に[[弁官|右大弁]]だった。

== 系譜 == *父：[[大伴安麻呂]] *母：不詳 *妻：[[大伴坂上郎女]] **女子：[[坂上大嬢]]（[[大伴家持]]室） **女子：[[坂上二嬢]]（[[大伴駿河麻呂]]室） *生母不詳の子女 **女子：[[田村大嬢]]（[[大伴稲公]]室）
== 脚注 == {{reflist}}
== 参考文献 == *[[宇治谷孟]]『続日本紀 （上）』[[講談社]]〈[[講談社学術文庫]]〉、1992年

revision.comment: 内部リンク[[按察使]]⇒[[按察使 (日本)]] に付け替え(ページ改名による)。
revision.text:
{{基礎情報 公家 | 氏名 = 大伴宿奈麻呂 | 画像 = | 画像サイズ = | 画像説明 = | 時代 = [[奈良時代]]前期 | 生誕 = 不詳 | 死没 = 不詳 | 改名 = | 別名 = | 諡号 = | 神号 = | 戒名 = | 墓所 = | 官位 = [[従四位|従四位下]]、[[弁官|右大弁]] | 主君 = [[元明天皇]]→[[元正天皇]]→[[聖武天皇]] | 氏族 = [[大伴氏]] | 父母 = 父：[[大伴安麻呂]]、母：不詳 | 兄弟 = [[大伴旅人|旅人]]、田主、[[大伴稲公|稲公]]、[[大伴坂上郎女|坂上郎女]]、'''宿奈麻呂''' | 妻 = [[大伴坂上郎女]] | 子 = [[大伴田村大嬢|田村大嬢]]、[[大伴坂上大嬢|坂上大嬢]]、[[大伴坂上二嬢|坂上二嬢]]、[[大伴古麻呂|古麻呂]]? | 特記事項 = }} '''大伴 宿奈麻呂'''（おおとも の すくなまろ）は、[[奈良時代]]前期の[[貴族]]・[[歌人]]。[[大納言]]・[[大伴安麻呂]]の三男。[[官位]]は[[従四位|従四位下]]・[[弁官|右大弁]]。
== 経歴 == [[元明天皇|元明]]朝の[[和銅]]元年（[[708年]]）[[従六位|従六位上]]から三階昇進して[[従五位|従五位下]]に叙せられる。その後、和銅5年（[[712年]]）従五位上、[[霊亀]]3年（[[717年]]）[[正五位|正五位下]]、[[養老]]4年（[[720年]]）正五位上と元明朝から[[元正天皇|元正]]朝にかけて順調に昇進する。またこの間、和銅8年（[[715年]]）[[近衛府|左衛士督]]、養老3年（[[719年]]）7月には[[備前国#国司|備前守]]在任中であったが、[[安芸国]]・[[周防国]]の[[按察使 (日本)|按察使]]に任ぜられている。
[[神亀]]元年（[[724年]]）[[聖武天皇]]の即位後間もなく従四位下に叙せられた。没年は不詳だが、おそらく神亀4年（[[727年]]）頃までに亡くなったと想定される。
神亀元年（724年）より以前、宮仕えする恋人に対する歌があり、『[[万葉集]]』にはこの2首が採録されている<ref>『万葉集』巻4-0532,0533）</ref>。また『万葉集』（4-759）によれば[[田村里]]（現在の[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]尼辻町）に住んでいたことが知られ、時に[[弁官|右大弁]]だった。
== 官歴 == 『[[続日本紀]]』による。 *時期不詳：[[従六位|従六位上]] *[[和銅]]元年（[[708年]]） 正月11日：[[従五位|従五位下]]（越階） *和銅5年（[[712年]]） 正月19日：従五位上 *和銅8年（[[715年]]） 5月22日：[[近衛府|左衛士督]] *[[霊亀]]3年（[[717年]]） 正月4日：[[正五位|正五位下]] *[[養老]]3年（[[719年]]） 7月13日：[[安芸国]][[周防国]][[按察使 (日本)|按察使]]、見[[備前国#国司|備前国守]] *養老4年（[[720年]]） 正月11日：正五位上 *[[神亀]]元年（[[724年]]） 2月22日：[[従四位|従四位下]] *時期不詳：[[弁官|右大弁]]<ref>『万葉集』巻4-759</ref>
== 系譜 == *父：[[大伴安麻呂]] *母：不詳 *妻：[[大伴坂上郎女]] **女子：[[大伴坂上大嬢]] - [[大伴家持]]正室 **女子：[[大伴坂上二嬢]] - [[大伴駿河麻呂]]婚約者? *生母不明の子女 **男子：[[大伴古麻呂]]<ref>諸説あり確実なことは不明</ref>? **女子：[[大伴田村大嬢]]
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}}
== 参考文献 == * [[宇治谷孟]]『続日本紀 全現代語訳 （上）』[[講談社]]〈[[講談社学術文庫]]〉、1992年。
{{DEFAULTSORT:おおとも の すくなまろ}} [[Category:大伴氏|すくなまろ]] [[Category:奈良時代の貴族]] [[Category:万葉歌人]] [[Category:7世紀生]] [[Category:8世紀没]]

{{Infobox Noble | name = Ōtomo no Sukunamaro | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = {{ill|Early Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | shinto_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | court_rank = {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}}, {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官}} (Right Major Controller) | ruler = {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇}} → {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} | clan = {{ill|Ōtomo clan|ja|大伴氏}} | parents = Father: {{ill|Ōtomo no Yasumaro|ja|大伴安麻呂}}, Mother: Unknown | siblings = {{ill|Ōtomo no Tabito|ja|大伴旅人}}, Tanushi, {{ill|Ōtomo no Inagimi|ja|大伴稲公}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume|ja|大伴坂上郎女}}, Sukunamaro | spouse = {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume|ja|大伴坂上郎女}} | children = {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴坂上大嬢}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂}}? }}
'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a {{ill|noble|ja|貴族}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人}} of the early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. He was the third son of {{ill|Ōtomo no Yasumaro|ja|大伴安麻呂}}. His court rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} era under {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇}}, Sukunamaro was promoted three ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上}} in 720 CE under {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇}}.
While serving as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|ja|備前国}} in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|ja|安芸国}} and {{ill|Suo Province|ja|周防国}}.
In the first year of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀}} (724 CE), shortly after {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the {{ill|Man'yōshū|ja|万葉集}}.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下}} (overstepping ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|ja|安芸国}} and {{ill|Suo Province|ja|周防国}}; served as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|ja|備前国}} * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官}} (Right Major Controller)
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Ōtomo no Yasumaro|ja|大伴安麻呂}} * Mother: Unknown * Wife: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume|ja|大伴坂上郎女}} * Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢}} * Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴坂上大嬢}} - Wife of {{ill|Ōtomo no Yakamochi|ja|大伴家持}} * Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢}} - Fiancée of {{ill|Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|ja|大伴駿河麻呂}} * Children of unknown mother: * Son: {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂}}? (uncertain lineage)

{{Infobox Noble | name = Ōtomo no Sukunamaro | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = {{ill|Early Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | shinto_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | court_rank = {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}}, {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官}} (Right Major Controller) | ruler = {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇}} → {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} | clan = {{ill|Ōtomo clan|ja|大伴氏}} | parents = Father: {{ill|Ōtomo no Yasumaro|ja|大伴安麻呂}}, Mother: Unknown | siblings = {{ill|Ōtomo no Tabito|ja|大伴旅人}}, Tanushi, {{ill|Ōtomo no Inagimi|ja|大伴稲公}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume|ja|大伴坂上郎女}}, Sukunamaro | spouse = {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume|ja|大伴坂上郎女}} | children = {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴坂上大嬢}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂}}? }}
'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a {{ill|noble|ja|貴族}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人}} of the early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. He was the third son of {{ill|Ōtomo no Yasumaro|ja|大伴安麻呂}}. His court rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} era under {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇}}, Sukunamaro was promoted three ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上}} in 720 CE under {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇}}.
While serving as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|ja|備前国}} in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|ja|安芸国}} and {{ill|Suo Province|ja|周防国}}.
In the first year of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀}} (724 CE), shortly after {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the {{ill|Man'yōshū|ja|万葉集}}.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下}} (overstepping ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|ja|安芸国}} and {{ill|Suo Province|ja|周防国}}; served as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|ja|備前国}} * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官}} (Right Major Controller)
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Ōtomo no Yasumaro|ja|大伴安麻呂}} * Mother: Unknown * Wife: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume|ja|大伴坂上郎女}} * Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢}} * Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴坂上大嬢}} - Wife of {{ill|Ōtomo no Yakamochi|ja|大伴家持}} * Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢}} - Fiancée of {{ill|Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|ja|大伴駿河麻呂}} * Children of unknown mother: * Son: {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂}}? (uncertain lineage)

{{Infobox Noble | name = Ōtomo no Sukunamaro | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = {{ill|Early Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | shinto_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | court_rank = {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}}, {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官}} (Right Major Controller) | ruler = {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇}} → {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} | clan = {{ill|Ōtomo clan|ja|大伴氏}} | parents = Father: {{ill|Ōtomo no Yasumaro|ja|大伴安麻呂}}, Mother: Unknown | siblings = {{ill|Ōtomo no Tabito|ja|大伴旅人}}, Tanushi, {{ill|Ōtomo no Inagimi|ja|大伴稲公}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume|ja|大伴坂上郎女}}, Sukunamaro | spouse = {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume|ja|大伴坂上郎女}} | children = {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴坂上大嬢}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂}}? }}
'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a {{ill|noble|ja|貴族}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人}} of the early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. He was the third son of {{ill|Ōtomo no Yasumaro|ja|大伴安麻呂}}. His court rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} era under {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇}}, Sukunamaro was promoted three ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上}} in 720 CE under {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇}}.
While serving as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|ja|備前国}} in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|ja|安芸国}} and {{ill|Suo Province|ja|周防国}}.
In the first year of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀}} (724 CE), shortly after {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the {{ill|Man'yōshū|ja|万葉集}}.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下}} (overstepping ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|ja|安芸国}} and {{ill|Suo Province|ja|周防国}}; served as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|ja|備前国}} * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官}} (Right Major Controller)
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Ōtomo no Yasumaro|ja|大伴安麻呂}} * Mother: Unknown * Wife: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume|ja|大伴坂上郎女}} * Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢}} * Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴坂上大嬢}} - Wife of {{ill|Ōtomo no Yakamochi|ja|大伴家持}} * Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢}} - Fiancée of {{ill|Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|ja|大伴駿河麻呂}} * Children of unknown mother: * Son: {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂}}? (uncertain lineage)
== References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}}
== Bibliography == * {{ill|Ujitani Makoto|ja|宇治谷孟}}, *Shoku Nihongi (Vol. 1)*, Kodansha Gakujutsu Bunko, 1992.

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a {{ill|noble|ja|貴族}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人}} of the early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. He was the third son of {{ill|Ōtomo no Yasumaro|ja|大伴安麻呂}}. His court rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} era under {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇}}, Sukunamaro was promoted three ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上}} in 720 CE under {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇}}.
While serving as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|ja|備前国}} in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|ja|安芸国}} and {{ill|Suo Province|ja|周防国}}.
In the first year of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀}} (724 CE), shortly after {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the {{ill|Man'yōshū|ja|万葉集}}.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a {{ill|noble|ja|貴族}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人}} of the early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. He was the third son of {{ill|Ōtomo no Yasumaro|ja|大伴安麻呂}}. His court rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} era under {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇}}, Sukunamaro was promoted three ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上}} in 720 CE under {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇}}.
While serving as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|ja|備前国}} in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|ja|安芸国}} and {{ill|Suo Province|ja|周防国}}.
In the first year of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀}} (724 CE), shortly after {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the {{ill|Man'yōshū|ja|万葉集}}.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下}} (overstepping ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|ja|安芸国}} and {{ill|Suo Province|ja|周防国}}; served as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|ja|備前国}} * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官}} (Right Major Controller)
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Ōtomo no Yasumaro|ja|大伴安麻呂}} * Mother: Unknown * Wife: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume|ja|大伴坂上郎女}} * Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢}} * Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴坂上大嬢}} - Wife of {{ill|Ōtomo no Yakamochi|ja|大伴家持}} * Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢}} - Fiancée of {{ill|Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|ja|大伴駿河麻呂}} * Children of unknown mother: * Son: {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂}}? (uncertain lineage)
== References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}}

{{Infobox Noble | name = Ōtomo no Sukunamaro | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = {{ill|Early Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | shinto_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | court_rank = {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}}, {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官}} (Right Major Controller) | ruler = {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇}} → {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} | clan = {{ill|Ōtomo clan|ja|大伴氏}} | parents = Father: {{ill|Ōtomo no Yasumaro|ja|大伴安麻呂}}, Mother: Unknown | siblings = {{ill|Ōtomo no Tabito|ja|大伴旅人}}, Tanushi, {{ill|Ōtomo no Inagimi|ja|大伴稲公}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume|ja|大伴坂上郎女}}, Sukunamaro | spouse = {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume|ja|大伴坂上郎女}} | children = {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴坂上大嬢}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂}}? }}
'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a {{ill|noble|ja|貴族}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人}} of the early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. He was the third son of {{ill|Ōtomo no Yasumaro|ja|大伴安麻呂}}. His court rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} era under {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇}}, Sukunamaro was promoted three ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上}} in 720 CE under {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇}}.
While serving as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|ja|備前国}} in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|ja|安芸国}} and {{ill|Suo Province|ja|周防国}}.
In the first year of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀}} (724 CE), shortly after {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the {{ill|Man'yōshū|ja|万葉集}}.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下}} (overstepping ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|ja|安芸国}} and {{ill|Suo Province|ja|周防国}}; served as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|ja|備前国}} * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官}} (Right Major Controller)
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Ōtomo no Yasumaro|ja|大伴安麻呂}} * Mother: Unknown * Wife: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume|ja|大伴坂上郎女}} * Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢}} * Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴坂上大嬢}} - Wife of {{ill|Ōtomo no Yakamochi|ja|大伴家持}} * Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢}} - Fiancée of {{ill|Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|ja|大伴駿河麻呂}} * Children of unknown mother: * Son: {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂}}? (uncertain lineage)

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a {{ill|noble|ja|貴族}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人}} of the early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. He was the third son of {{ill|Ōtomo no Yasumaro|ja|大伴安麻呂}}. His court rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} era under {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇}}, Sukunamaro was promoted three ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上}} in 720 CE under {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇}}.
While serving as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|ja|備前国}} in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|ja|安芸国}} and {{ill|Suo Province|ja|周防国}}.
In the first year of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀}} (724 CE), shortly after {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the {{ill|Man'yōshū|ja|万葉集}}.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下}} (overstepping ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|ja|安芸国}} and {{ill|Suo Province|ja|周防国}}; served as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|ja|備前国}} * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|lt=Benkan}} (Right Major Controller)

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a {{ill|noble|ja|貴族}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人}} of the early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. He was the third son of {{ill|Ōtomo no Yasumaro|ja|大伴安麻呂}}. His court rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} era under {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇}}, Sukunamaro was promoted three ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上}} in 720 CE under {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇}}.
While serving as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|ja|備前国}} in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|ja|安芸国}} and {{ill|Suo Province|ja|周防国}}.
In the first year of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀}} (724 CE), shortly after {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the {{ill|Man'yōshū|ja|万葉集}}.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下}} (overstepping ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|ja|安芸国}} and {{ill|Suo Province|ja|周防国}}; served as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|ja|備前国}} * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|lt=Benkan}} (Right Major Controller)

revision.text:
{{Infobox Noble | name = Ōtomo no Sukunamaro | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = {{ill|Early Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | shinto_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | court_rank = {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}}, {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官}} (Right Major Controller) | ruler = {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇}} → {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} | clan = {{ill|Ōtomo clan|ja|大伴氏}} | parents = Father: {{ill|Ōtomo no Yasumaro|ja|大伴安麻呂}}, Mother: Unknown | siblings = {{ill|Ōtomo no Tabito|ja|大伴旅人}}, Tanushi, {{ill|Ōtomo no Inagimi|ja|大伴稲公}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume|ja|大伴坂上郎女}}, Sukunamaro | spouse = {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume|ja|大伴坂上郎女}} | children = {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴坂上大嬢}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂}}? }}
'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a {{ill|noble|ja|貴族}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人}} of the early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. He was the third son of {{ill|Ōtomo no Yasumaro|ja|大伴安麻呂}}. His court rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} era under {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇}}, Sukunamaro was promoted three ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上}} in 720 CE under {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇}}.
While serving as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|ja|備前国}} in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|ja|安芸国}} and {{ill|Suo Province|ja|周防国}}.
In the first year of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀}} (724 CE), shortly after {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the {{ill|Man'yōshū|ja|万葉集}}.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下}} (overstepping ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|ja|安芸国}} and {{ill|Suo Province|ja|周防国}}; served as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|ja|備前国}} * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|lt=Benkan}} (Right Major Controller)
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Ōtomo no Yasumaro|ja|大伴安麻呂}} * Mother: Unknown * Wife: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume|ja|大伴坂上郎女}} ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢}} ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴坂上大嬢}} - Wife of {{ill|Ōtomo no Yakamochi|ja|大伴家持}} ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢}} - Fiancée of {{ill|Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|ja|大伴駿河麻呂}} * Children of unknown mother: ** Son: {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂}}? (uncertain lineage)
== References == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}}

{{Infobox Noble | name = Ōtomo no Sukunamaro | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = {{ill|Early Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | shinto_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | court_rank = {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}, {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官}} (Right Major Controller) | ruler = {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇}} → {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} | clan = {{ill|Ōtomo clan|ja|大伴氏}} | parents = Father: {{ill|Ōtomo no Yasumaro|ja|大伴安麻呂}}, Mother: Unknown | siblings = {{ill|Ōtomo no Tabito|ja|大伴旅人}}, Tanushi, {{ill|Ōtomo no Inagimi|ja|大伴稲公}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume|ja|大伴坂上郎女}}, Sukunamaro | spouse = {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume|ja|大伴坂上郎女}} | children = {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴坂上大嬢}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂}}? }}
'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a {{ill|noble|ja|貴族}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人}} of the early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. He was the third son of {{ill|Ōtomo no Yasumaro|ja|大伴安麻呂}}. His court rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} era under {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇}}, Sukunamaro was promoted three ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上}} in 720 CE under {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇}}.
While serving as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|ja|備前国}} in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|ja|安芸国}} and {{ill|Suo Province|ja|周防国}}.
In the first year of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀}} (724 CE), shortly after {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the {{ill|Man'yōshū|ja|万葉集}}.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下}} (overstepping ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|ja|安芸国}} and {{ill|Suo Province|ja|周防国}}; served as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|ja|備前国}} * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|lt=Benkan}} (Right Major Controller)
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Ōtomo no Yasumaro|ja|大伴安麻呂}} * Mother: Unknown * Wife: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume|ja|大伴坂上郎女}} ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢}} ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴坂上大嬢}} - Wife of {{ill|Ōtomo no Yakamochi|ja|大伴家持}} ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢}} - Fiancée of {{ill|Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|ja|大伴駿河麻呂}} * Children of unknown mother: ** Son: {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂}}? (uncertain lineage)

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a {{ill|noble|ja|貴族}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人}} of the early {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. He was the third son of {{ill|Ōtomo no Yasumaro|ja|大伴安麻呂}}. His court rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} era under {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|元明天皇}}, Sukunamaro was promoted three ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in 720 CE under {{ill|Empress Genshō|ja|元正天皇}}.
While serving as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|ja|備前国}} in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|ja|安芸国}} and {{ill|Suo Province|ja|周防国}}.
In the first year of {{ill|Shinki|ja|神亀}} (724 CE), shortly after {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇}} ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the {{ill|Man'yōshū|ja|万葉集}}.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} (overstepping ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|ja|安芸国}} and {{ill|Suo Province|ja|周防国}}; served as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|ja|備前国}} * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|lt=Benkan}} (Right Major Controller)
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Ōtomo no Yasumaro|ja|大伴安麻呂}} * Mother: Unknown * Wife: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume|ja|大伴坂上郎女}} ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢}} ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴坂上大嬢}} - Wife of {{ill|Ōtomo no Yakamochi|ja|大伴家持}} ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢}} - Fiancée of {{ill|Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|ja|大伴駿河麻呂}} * Children of unknown mother: ** Son: {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂}}? revision.text:
{{基礎情報 公家 | 氏名 = 大伴宿奈麻呂 | 画像 = | 画像サイズ = | 画像説明 = | 時代 = [[奈良時代]]前期 | 生誕 = 不詳 | 死没 = 不詳 | 改名 = | 別名 = | 諡号 = | 神号 = | 戒名 = | 墓所 = | 官位 = [[従四位|従四位下]]、[[弁官|右大弁]] | 主君 = [[元明天皇]]→[[元正天皇]]→[[聖武天皇]] | 氏族 = [[大伴氏]] | 父母 = 父：[[大伴安麻呂]]、母：不詳 | 兄弟 = [[大伴旅人|旅人]]、田主、[[大伴稲公|稲公]]、[[大伴坂上郎女|坂上郎女]]、'''宿奈麻呂''' | 妻 = [[大伴坂上郎女]] | 子 = [[大伴田村大嬢|田村大嬢]]、[[大伴坂上大嬢|坂上大嬢]]、[[大伴坂上二嬢|坂上二嬢]]、[[大伴古麻呂|古麻呂]]? | 特記事項 = }} '''大伴 宿奈麻呂'''（おおとも の すくなまろ）は、[[奈良時代]]前期の[[貴族]]・[[歌人]]。[[大納言]]・[[大伴安麻呂]]の三男。[[官位]]は[[従四位|従四位下]]・[[弁官|右大弁]]。
== 経歴 == [[元明天皇|元明]]朝の[[和銅]]元年（[[708年]]）[[従六位|従六位上]]から三階昇進して[[従五位|従五位下]]に叙せられる。その後、和銅5年（[[712年]]）従五位上、[[霊亀]]3年（[[717年]]）[[正五位|正五位下]]、[[養老]]4年（[[720年]]）正五位上と元明朝から[[元正天皇|元正]]朝にかけて順調に昇進する。またこの間、和銅8年（[[715年]]）[[近衛府|左衛士督]]、養老3年（[[719年]]）7月には[[備前国#国司|備前守]]在任中であったが、[[安芸国]]・[[周防国]]の[[按察使 (日本)|按察使]]に任ぜられている。
[[神亀]]元年（[[724年]]）[[聖武天皇]]の即位後間もなく従四位下に叙せられた。没年は不詳だが、おそらく神亀4年（[[727年]]）頃までに亡くなったと想定される。
神亀元年（724年）より以前、宮仕えする恋人に対する歌があり、『[[万葉集]]』にはこの2首が採録されている<ref>『万葉集』巻4-0532,0533）</ref>。また『万葉集』（4-759）によれば[[田村里]]（現在の[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]尼辻町）に住んでいたことが知られ、時に[[弁官|右大弁]]だった。
== 官歴 == 『[[続日本紀]]』による。 *時期不詳：[[従六位|従六位上]] *[[和銅]]元年（[[708年]]） 正月11日：[[従五位|従五位下]]（越階） *和銅5年（[[712年]]） 正月19日：従五位上 *和銅8年（[[715年]]） 5月22日：[[近衛府|左衛士督]] *[[霊亀]]3年（[[717年]]） 正月4日：[[正五位|正五位下]] *[[養老]]3年（[[719年]]） 7月13日：[[安芸国]][[周防国]][[按察使 (日本)|按察使]]、見[[備前国#国司|備前国守]] *養老4年（[[720年]]） 正月11日：正五位上 *[[神亀]]元年（[[724年]]） 2月22日：[[従四位|従四位下]] *時期不詳：[[弁官|右大弁]]<ref>『万葉集』巻4-759</ref>
== 系譜 == *父：[[大伴安麻呂]] *母：不詳 *妻：[[大伴坂上郎女]] **女子：[[大伴坂上大嬢]] - [[大伴家持]]正室 **女子：[[大伴坂上二嬢]] - [[大伴駿河麻呂]]婚約者? *生母不明の子女 **男子：[[大伴古麻呂]]<ref>諸説あり確実なことは不明</ref>? **女子：[[大伴田村大嬢]]
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}}
== 参考文献 == * [[宇治谷孟]]『続日本紀 全現代語訳 （上）』[[講談社]]〈[[講談社学術文庫]]〉、1992年。

{{基礎情報 公家 | 氏名 = 大伴宿奈麻呂 | 画像 = | 画像サイズ = | 画像説明 = | 時代 = [[奈良時代]]前期 | 生誕 = 不詳 | 死没 = 不詳 | 改名 = | 別名 = | 諡号 = | 神号 = | 戒名 = | 墓所 = | 官位 = [[従四位|従四位下]]、[[弁官|右大弁]] | 主君 = [[元明天皇]]→[[元正天皇]]→[[聖武天皇]] | 氏族 = [[大伴氏]] | 父母 = 父：[[大伴安麻呂]]、母：不詳 | 兄弟 = [[大伴旅人|旅人]]、田主、[[大伴稲公|稲公]]、[[大伴坂上郎女|坂上郎女]]、'''宿奈麻呂''' | 妻 = [[大伴坂上郎女]] | 子 = [[大伴田村大嬢|田村大嬢]]、[[大伴坂上大嬢|坂上大嬢]]、[[大伴坂上二嬢|坂上二嬢]]、[[大伴古麻呂|古麻呂]]? | 特記事項 = }} '''大伴 宿奈麻呂'''（おおとも の すくなまろ）は、[[奈良時代]]前期の[[貴族]]・[[歌人]]。[[大納言]]・[[大伴安麻呂]]の三男。[[官位]]は[[従四位|従四位下]]・[[弁官|右大弁]]。
== 経歴 == [[元明天皇|元明]]朝の[[和銅]]元年（[[708年]]）[[従六位|従六位上]]から三階昇進して[[従五位|従五位下]]に叙せられる。その後、和銅5年（[[712年]]）従五位上、[[霊亀]]3年（[[717年]]）[[正五位|正五位下]]、[[養老]]4年（[[720年]]）正五位上と元明朝から[[元正天皇|元正]]朝にかけて順調に昇進する。またこの間、和銅8年（[[715年]]）[[近衛府|左衛士督]]、養老3年（[[719年]]）7月には[[備前国#国司|備前守]]在任中であったが、[[安芸国]]・[[周防国]]の[[按察使 (日本)|按察使]]に任ぜられている。
[[神亀]]元年（[[724年]]）[[聖武天皇]]の即位後間もなく従四位下に叙せられた。没年は不詳だが、おそらく神亀4年（[[727年]]）頃までに亡くなったと想定される。
神亀元年（724年）より以前、宮仕えする恋人に対する歌があり、『[[万葉集]]』にはこの2首が採録されている<ref>『万葉集』巻4-0532,0533）</ref>。また『万葉集』（4-759）によれば[[田村里]]（現在の[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]尼辻町）に住んでいたことが知られ、時に[[弁官|右大弁]]だった。
== 官歴 == 『[[続日本紀]]』による。 *時期不詳：[[従六位|従六位上]] *[[和銅]]元年（[[708年]]） 正月11日：[[従五位|従五位下]]（越階） *和銅5年（[[712年]]） 正月19日：従五位上 *和銅8年（[[715年]]） 5月22日：[[近衛府|左衛士督]] *[[霊亀]]3年（[[717年]]） 正月4日：[[正五位|正五位下]] *[[養老]]3年（[[719年]]） 7月13日：[[安芸国]][[周防国]][[按察使 (日本)|按察使]]、見[[備前国#国司|備前国守]] *養老4年（[[720年]]） 正月11日：正五位上 *[[神亀]]元年（[[724年]]） 2月22日：[[従四位|従四位下]] *時期不詳：[[弁官|右大弁]]<ref>『万葉集』巻4-759</ref>
== 系譜 == *父：[[大伴安麻呂]] *母：不詳 *妻：[[大伴坂上郎女]] **女子：[[大伴坂上大嬢]] - [[大伴家持]]正室 **女子：[[大伴坂上二嬢]] - [[大伴駿河麻呂]]婚約者? *生母不明の子女 **男子：[[大伴古麻呂]]<ref>諸説あり確実なことは不明</ref>? **女子：[[大伴田村大嬢]]
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}}
== 参考文献 == * [[宇治谷孟]]『続日本紀 全現代語訳 （上）』[[講談社]]〈[[講談社学術文庫]]〉、1992年。

revision.text:
{{Infobox Noble | name = Ōtomo no Sukunamaro | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = [[:en:Nara period|Early Nara period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | shinto_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | court_Rank = {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}, {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|qq=}} (Right Major Controller) | ruler = [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]] → [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]] → [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] | clan = [[:en:Ōtomo clan (ancient)|Ōtomo clan]] | parents = Father: {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}, Mother: Unknown | siblings = [[:en:Ōtomo no Tabito|Ōtomo no Tabito]], Tanushi, {{ill|Ōtomo no Inagimi|ja|大伴稲公|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Inagimi|qq=}}, [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Iratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume]], Sukunamaro | spouse = [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Iratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume]] | children = {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|qq=}}, [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Ōiratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume]], {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|qq=}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Komaro|qq=}}? }}
'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a [[:en:Nobility|noble]] and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|qq=}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] era under [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in 720 CE under [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]].
While serving as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]].
In the first year of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] (724 CE), shortly after [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the [[:en:Man'yōshū|Man'yōshū]].<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} (overstepping Ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|qq=}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]]; served as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan (Magistrate)|qq=}} (Right Major Controller)
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}} * Mother: Unknown * Wife: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Iratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|qq=}} ** Daughter: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Ōiratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume]] - Wife of [[:en:Ōtomo no Yakamochi|Ōtomo no Yakamochi]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|qq=}} - Fiancée of {{ill|Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|ja|大伴駿河麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|qq=}} * Children of unknown mother: ** Son: {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Komaro|qq=}}? (uncertain lineage)
== References ==
{{reflist}}
== Bibliography == * {{ill|Ujitani Makoto|ja|宇治谷孟|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ujitani Makoto|qq=}}, *Shoku Nihongi (Vol. 1)*, Kodansha Gakujutsu Bunko, 1992.

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a [[:en:Nobility|noble]] and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|qq=}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] era under [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in 720 CE under [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]].

In the first year of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] (724 CE), shortly after [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the [[:en:Man'yōshū|Man'yōshū]].<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>

[[sn:Ōtomo no Sukinamaro]] [[en:Ōtomo no Sukinamaro]] [[ja:大伴宿奈麻呂]] [[ja:Ōtomo no Sukinamaro]] [[Category:Man'yō poets]]

{{Infobox Noble | name = Ōtomo no Sukunamaro | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = [[:en:Nara period|Early Nara period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | shinto_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | court_Rank = {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}, {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|qq=}} (Right Major Controller) | ruler = [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]] → [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]] → [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] | clan = [[:en:Ōtomo clan (ancient)|Ōtomo clan]] | parents = Father: {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}, Mother: Unknown | siblings = [[:en:Ōtomo no Tabito|Ōtomo no Tabito]], Tanushi, {{ill|Ōtomo no Inagimi|ja|大伴稲公|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Inagimi|qq=}}, [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Iratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume]], Sukunamaro | spouse = [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Iratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume]] | children = {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|qq=}}, [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Ōiratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume]], {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|qq=}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Komaro|qq=}}? }}
'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a [[:en:Nobility|noble]] and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|qq=}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] era under [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in 720 CE under [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]].
While serving as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]].
In the first year of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] (724 CE), shortly after [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the [[:en:Man'yōshū|Man'yōshū]].<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} (overstepping Ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|qq=}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]]; served as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan (Magistrate)|qq=}} (Right Major Controller)
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}} * Mother: Unknown * Wife: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Iratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|qq=}} ** Daughter: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Ōiratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume]] - Wife of [[:en:Ōtomo no Yakamochi|Ōtomo no Yakamochi]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|qq=}} - Fiancée of {{ill|Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|ja|大伴駿河麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|qq=}} * Children of unknown mother: ** Son: {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Komaro|qq=}}? {{Infobox Noble | name = Ōtomo no Sukunamaro | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = [[:en:Nara period|Early Nara period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | shinto_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | court_Rank = {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}, {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|qq=}} (Right Major Controller) | ruler = [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]] → [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]] → [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] | clan = [[:en:Ōtomo clan (ancient)|Ōtomo clan]] | parents = Father: {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}, Mother: Unknown | siblings = [[:en:Ōtomo no Tabito|Ōtomo no Tabito]], Tanushi, {{ill|Ōtomo no Inagimi|ja|大伴稲公|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Inagimi|qq=}}, [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Iratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume]], Sukunamaro | spouse = [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Iratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume]] | children = {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|qq=}}, [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Ōiratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume]], {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|qq=}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Komaro|qq=}}? }}
'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a [[:en:Nobility|noble]] and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|qq=}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] era under [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in 720 CE under [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]].
While serving as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]].
In the first year of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] (724 CE), shortly after [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the [[:en:Man'yōshū|Man'yōshū]].<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} (overstepping Ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|qq=}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]]; served as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan (Magistrate)|qq=}} (Right Major Controller)
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}} * Mother: Unknown * Wife: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Iratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|qq=}} ** Daughter: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Ōiratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume]] - Wife of [[:en:Ōtomo no Yakamochi|Ōtomo no Yakamochi]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|qq=}} - Fiancée of {{ill|Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|ja|大伴駿河麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|qq=}} * Children of unknown mother: ** Son: {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Komaro|qq=}}? (uncertain lineage)

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a [[:en:Nobility|noble]] and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|qq=}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] era under [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in 720 CE under [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]].
While serving as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]].
In the first year of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] (724 CE), shortly after [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the [[:en:Man'yōshū|Man'yōshū]].<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} (overstepping Ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|qq=}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]]; served as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan (Magistrate)|qq=}} (Right Major Controller)
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}} * Mother: Unknown * Wife: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Iratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|qq=}} ** Daughter: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Ōiratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume]] - Wife of [[:en:Ōtomo no Yakamochi|Ōtomo no Yakamochi]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|qq=}} - Fiancée of {{ill|Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|ja|大伴駿河麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|qq=}} * Children of unknown mother: ** Son: {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Komaro|qq=}}? (uncertain lineage)

In the first year of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] (724 CE), shortly after [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a [[:en:Nobility|noble]] and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|qq=}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] era under [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]].
While serving as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]].
In the first year of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] (724 CE), shortly after [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the [[:en:Man'yōshū|Man'yōshū]].<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
