== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} (overstepping Ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]]; served as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan (Magistrate)|qq=}} (Right Major Controller)

revision.text:
{{Infobox Noble | name = Ōtomo no Sukunamaro | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = [[:en:Nara period|Early Nara period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | shinto_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | court_Rank = {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|qq=}} (Right Major Controller) | ruler = [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]] → [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]] → [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] | clan = [[:en:Ōtomo clan (ancient)|Ōtomo clan]] | parents = Father: {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}, Mother: Unknown | siblings = [[:en:Ōtomo no Tabito|Ōtomo no Tabito]], Tanushi, {{ill|Ōtomo no Inagimi|ja|大伴稲公|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Inagimi|qq=}}, [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Iratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume]], Sukunamaro | spouse = [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Iratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume]] | children = {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|qq=}}, [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Ōiratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume]], {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|qq=}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Komaro|qq=}}? }}
'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a [[:en:Nobility|noble]] and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|qq=}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] era under [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]].
While serving as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]].
In the first year of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] (724 CE), shortly after [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the [[:en:Man'yōshū|Man'yōshū]].<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} (overstepping Ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]]; served as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan (Magistrate)|qq=}} (Right Major Controller)
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}} * Mother: Unknown * Wife: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Iratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|qq=}} ** Daughter: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Ōiratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume]] - Wife of [[:en:Ōtomo no Yakamochi|Ōtomo no Yakamochi]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|qq=}} - Fiancée of {{ill|Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|ja|大伴駿河麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|qq=}} * Children of unknown mother: ** Son: {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Komaro|qq=}}? (uncertain lineage)

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q10933541]] Wikidata name: Otomo no Sukunamaro [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:40, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox Noble | name = Ōtomo no Sukunamaro | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = [[:en:Nara period|Early Nara period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = | posthumous_name = | shinto_name = | dharma_name = | burial_place = | court_Rank = {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|qq=}} (Right Major Controller) | ruler = [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]] → [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]] → [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] | clan = [[:en:Ōtomo clan (ancient)|Ōtomo clan]] | parents = Father: {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}, Mother: Unknown | siblings = [[:en:Ōtomo no Tabito|Ōtomo no Tabito]], Tanushi, {{ill|Ōtomo no Inagimi|ja|大伴稲公|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Inagimi|qq=}}, [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Iratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume]], Sukunamaro | spouse = [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Iratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume]] | children = {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|qq=}}, [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Ōiratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume]], {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|qq=}}, {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Komaro|qq=}}? }}
'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a [[:en:Nobility|noble]] and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|qq=}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] era under [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]].
While serving as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]].
In the first year of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] (724 CE), shortly after [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the [[:en:Man'yōshū|Man'yōshū]].<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} (overstepping Ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]]; served as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|1=Benkan (administrator)|lt=Benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan (Magistrate)|qq=}} (Right Major Controller)

(uncertain lineage)

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a [[:en:Nobility|noble]] and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] era under [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]].
While serving as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]].
In the first year of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] (724 CE), shortly after [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the [[:en:Man'yōshū|Man'yōshū]].<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>

In the first year of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] (724 CE), shortly after [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the [[:en:Man'yōshū|Man'yōshū]].<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a [[:en:Nobility|noble]] and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] era under [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]].
While serving as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]].
In the first year of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] (724 CE), shortly after [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the [[:en:Man'yōshū|Man'yōshū]].<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} (overstepping Ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]]; served as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan (Magistrate)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller)

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a [[:en:Nobility|noble]] and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] era under [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]].
While serving as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]].
In the first year of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] (724 CE), shortly after [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the [[:en:Man'yōshū|Man'yōshū]].<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} (overstepping Ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]]; served as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan (Magistrate)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller)
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}} * Mother: Unknown * Wife: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Iratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|qq=|1=Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11576897}} ** Daughter: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Ōiratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume]] - Wife of [[:en:Ōtomo no Yakamochi|Ōtomo no Yakamochi]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|qq=|1=Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Otoiratsume|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11424768}} - Fiancée of {{ill|Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|ja|大伴駿河麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|qq=|1=Surugamaro Ootomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432360}} * Children of unknown mother: ** Son: {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Komaro|qq=|1=Ōtomo no Komaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432332}}? '''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a [[:en:Nobility|noble]] and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] era under [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]].
While serving as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]].
In the first year of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] (724 CE), shortly after [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the [[:en:Man'yōshū|Man'yōshū]].<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} (overstepping Ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]]; served as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan (Magistrate)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller)

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a [[:en:Nobility|noble]] and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] era under [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]].
While serving as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]].
In the first year of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] (724 CE), shortly after [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the [[:en:Man'yōshū|Man'yōshū]].<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} (overstepping Ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]]; served as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|lt=Benkan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan (Magistrate)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller)

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a [[:en:Nobility|noble]] and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] era under [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]].
While serving as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]].
In the first year of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] (724 CE), shortly after [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the [[:en:Man'yōshū|Man'yōshū]].<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} (overstepping Ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]]; served as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan (Magistrate)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller)
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}} * Mother: Unknown * Wife: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Iratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|1=Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11576897}} ** Daughter: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Ōiratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume]] - Wife of [[:en:Ōtomo no Yakamochi|Ōtomo no Yakamochi]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|1=Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Otoiratsume|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11424768}} - Fiancée of {{ill|Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|ja|大伴駿河麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|1=Surugamaro Ootomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432360}} * Children of unknown mother: ** Son: {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Komaro|1=Ōtomo no Komaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432332}}? (uncertain lineage)

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a [[:en:Nobility|noble]] and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] era under [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]].
While serving as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]].
In the first year of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] (724 CE), shortly after [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the [[:en:Man'yōshū|Man'yōshū]].<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} (overstepping Ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]]; served as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan (Magistrate)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller)
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}} * Mother: Unknown * Wife: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Iratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|1=Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11576897}} ** Daughter: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Ōiratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume]] - Wife of [[:en:Ōtomo no Yakamochi|Ōtomo no Yakamochi]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|1=Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Otoiratsume|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11424768}} - Fiancée of {{ill|Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|ja|大伴駿河麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|1=Surugamaro Ootomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432360}} * Children of unknown mother: ** Son: {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Komaro|1=Ōtomo no Komaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432332}}? (uncertain lineage)

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a [[:en:Nobility|noble]] and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] era under [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]].
While serving as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]].
In the first year of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] (724 CE), shortly after [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the [[:en:Man'yōshū|Man'yōshū]].<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} (overstepping Ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]]; served as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan (Magistrate)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller)
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}} * Mother: Unknown * Wife: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Iratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|1=Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11576897}} ** Daughter: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Ōiratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume]] - Wife of [[:en:Ōtomo no Yakamochi|Ōtomo no Yakamochi]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|1=Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Otoiratsume|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11424768}} - Fiancée of {{ill|Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|ja|大伴駿河麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|1=Surugamaro Ootomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432360}} * Children of unknown mother: ** Son: {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Komaro|1=Ōtomo no Komaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432332}}? '''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a [[:en:Nobility|noble]] and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] era under [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]].
While serving as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]].
In the first year of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] (724 CE), shortly after [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the [[:en:Man'yōshū|Man'yōshū]].<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} (overstepping Ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]]; served as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan (Magistrate)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller)

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a [[:en:Nobility|noble]] and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] era under [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]].
While serving as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]].
In the first year of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] (724 CE), shortly after [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the [[:en:Man'yōshū|Man'yōshū]].<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} (overstepping Ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]]; served as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan (Magistrate)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller)
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}} * Mother: Unknown * Wife: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Iratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|1=Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11576897}} ** Daughter: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Ōiratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume]] - Wife of [[:en:Ōtomo no Yakamochi|Ōtomo no Yakamochi]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|1=Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Otoiratsume|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11424768}} - Fiancée of {{ill|Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|ja|大伴駿河麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|1=Surugamaro Ootomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432360}} * Children of unknown mother: ** Son: {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Komaro|1=Ōtomo no Komaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432332}}? (uncertain lineage)

Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Komaro|1=Ōtomo no Komaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432332}}? }}
'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a [[:en:Nobility|noble]] and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] era under [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]].
While serving as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]].
In the first year of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] (724 CE), shortly after [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the [[:en:Man'yōshū|Man'yōshū]].<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} (overstepping Ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]]; served as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan (Magistrate)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller)
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}} * Mother: Unknown * Wife: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Iratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|1=Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11576897}} ** Daughter: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Ōiratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume]] - Wife of [[:en:Ōtomo no Yakamochi|Ōtomo no Yakamochi]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|1=Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Otoiratsume|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11424768}} - Fiancée of {{ill|Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|ja|大伴駿河麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|1=Surugamaro Ootomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432360}} * Children of unknown mother: ** Son: {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Komaro|1=Ōtomo no Komaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432332}}? (uncertain lineage)
