'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a [[:en:Nobility|noble]] and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] era under [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]].
While serving as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]].
In the first year of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] (724 CE), shortly after [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the [[:en:Man'yōshū|Man'yōshū]].<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} (overstepping Ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]]; served as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan (Magistrate)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller)
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}} * Mother: Unknown * Wife: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Iratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|1=Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11576897}} ** Daughter: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Ōiratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume]] - Wife of [[:en:Ōtomo no Yakamochi|Ōtomo no Yakamochi]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|1=Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Otoiratsume|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11424768}} - Fiancée of {{ill|Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|ja|大伴駿河麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|1=Surugamaro Ootomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432360}} * Children of unknown mother: ** Son: {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Komaro|1=Ōtomo no Komaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432332}}? (uncertain lineage)

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a [[:en:Nobility|noble]] and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] era under [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]].
While serving as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]].
In the first year of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] (724 CE), shortly after [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the [[:en:Man'yōshū|Man'yōshū]].<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} (overstepping Ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]]; served as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan (Magistrate)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller)
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}} * Mother: Unknown * Wife: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Iratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|1=Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11576897}} ** Daughter: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Ōiratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume]] - Wife of [[:en:Ōtomo no Yakamochi|Ōtomo no Yakamochi]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|1=Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Otoiratsume|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11424768}} - Fiancée of {{ill|Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|ja|大伴駿河麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|1=Surugamaro Ootomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432360}} * Children of unknown mother: ** Son: {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Komaro|1=Ōtomo no Komaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432332}}? (uncertain lineage)

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a [[:en:Nobility|noble]] and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] era under [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]].
While serving as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]].
In the first year of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] (724 CE), shortly after [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the [[:en:Man'yōshū|Man'yōshū]].<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} (overstepping Ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]]; served as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan (Magistrate)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller)

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a [[:en:Nobility|noble]] and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] era under [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]].
While serving as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]].
In the first year of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] (724 CE), shortly after [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the [[:en:Man'yōshū|Man'yōshū]].<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} (overstepping Ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]]; served as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan (Magistrate)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller)
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}} * Mother: Unknown * Wife: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Iratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|1=Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11576897}} ** Daughter: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Ōiratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume]] - Wife of [[:en:Ōtomo no Yakamochi|Ōtomo no Yakamochi]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|1=Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Otoiratsume|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11424768}} - Fiancée of {{ill|Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|ja|大伴駿河麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|1=Surugamaro Ootomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432360}} * Children of unknown mother: ** Son: {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Komaro|1=Ōtomo no Komaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432332}}? (uncertain lineage)

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a [[:en:Nobility|noble]] and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] era under [[:en:Empress Genmei|Empress Genmei]], Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under [[:en:Empress Genshō|Empress Genshō]].
While serving as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]].
In the first year of [[:en:Jinki (era)|Shinki]] (724 CE), shortly after [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Emperor Shōmu]] ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the [[:en:Man'yōshū|Man'yōshū]].<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} (overstepping Ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of [[:en:Aki Province|Aki Province]] and [[:en:Suō Province|Suo Province]]; served as Governor of [[:en:Bizen Province|Bizen Province]] * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan (Magistrate)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller)
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}} * Mother: Unknown * Wife: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Iratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Iratsume]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|ja|大伴田村大嬢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|1=Ōtomo no Tamura no Ōiratsume|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11576897}} ** Daughter: [[:en:Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Ōiratsume|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Ōiratsume]] - Wife of [[:en:Ōtomo no Yakamochi|Ōtomo no Yakamochi]] ** Daughter: {{ill|Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|ja|大伴坂上二嬢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Sakanoe no Niiratsume|1=Ōtomo no Sakanoue no Otoiratsume|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11424768}} - Fiancée of {{ill|Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|ja|大伴駿河麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Suruga no Maro|1=Surugamaro Ootomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432360}} * Children of unknown mother: ** Son: {{ill|Ōtomo no Komaro|ja|大伴古麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Komaro|1=Ōtomo no Komaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432332}}? (uncertain lineage)

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a {{ill|Nobility|en|Nobility|WD=Q134737|lt=noble}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period}}. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō}} era under {{ill|Empress Genmei|en|Empress Genmei|WD=Q233224|lt=Empress Genmei}}, Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|WD=Q235343|lt=Empress Genshō}}.
While serving as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|en|Bizen Province|WD=Q1053688|lt=Bizen Province}} in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|en|Aki Province|WD=Q965029|lt=Aki Province}} and {{ill|Suō Province|en|Suō Province|WD=Q1053037|lt=Suo Province}}.
In the first year of {{ill|Jinki (era)|en|Jinki (era)|WD=Q1373210|lt=Shinki}} (724 CE), shortly after {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|WD=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu}} ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the {{ill|Man'yōshū|en|Man'yōshū|WD=Q834321|lt=Man'yōshū}}.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|WD=Q169134|lt=Nara City}}, Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a {{ill|Nobility|en|Nobility|WD=Q134737|lt=noble}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period}}. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller).
== Career == In the {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō}} era under {{ill|Empress Genmei|en|Empress Genmei|WD=Q233224|lt=Empress Genmei}}, Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|WD=Q235343|lt=Empress Genshō}}.
While serving as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|en|Bizen Province|WD=Q1053688|lt=Bizen Province}} in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|en|Aki Province|WD=Q965029|lt=Aki Province}} and {{ill|Suō Province|en|Suō Province|WD=Q1053037|lt=Suo Province}}.
In the first year of {{ill|Jinki (era)|en|Jinki (era)|WD=Q1373210|lt=Shinki}} (724 CE), shortly after {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|WD=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu}} ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the {{ill|Man'yōshū|en|Man'yōshū|WD=Q834321|lt=Man'yōshū}}.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|WD=Q169134|lt=Nara City}}, Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
== Career Timeline == * Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} * 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} (overstepping Ranks) * 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} * 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|en|Aki Province|WD=Q965029|lt=Aki Province}} and {{ill|Suō Province|en|Suō Province|WD=Q1053037|lt=Suo Province}}; served as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|en|Bizen Province|WD=Q1053688|lt=Bizen Province}} * 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} * Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan (Magistrate)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller)

== Career == In the {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō}} era under {{ill|Empress Genmei|en|Empress Genmei|WD=Q233224|lt=Empress Genmei}}, Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily: - Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE. - Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|WD=Q235343|lt=Empress Genshō}}.
While serving as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|en|Bizen Province|WD=Q1053688|lt=Bizen Province}} in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|en|Aki Province|WD=Q965029|lt=Aki Province}} and {{ill|Suō Province|en|Suō Province|WD=Q1053037|lt=Suo Province}}.
In the first year of {{ill|Jinki (era)|en|Jinki (era)|WD=Q1373210|lt=Shinki}} (724 CE), shortly after {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|WD=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu}} ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.
Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the {{ill|Man'yōshū|en|Man'yōshū|WD=Q834321|lt=Man'yōshū}}.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|WD=Q169134|lt=Nara City}}, Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a {{ill|Nobility|en|Nobility|WD=Q134737|lt=noble}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period}}. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller).

== Career ==
In the {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō}} era under {{ill|Empress Genmei|en|Empress Genmei|WD=Q233224|lt=Empress Genmei}}, Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily:
- Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE.
- Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|WD=Q235343|lt=Empress Genshō}}.

While serving as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|en|Bizen Province|WD=Q1053688|lt=Bizen Province}} in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|en|Aki Province|WD=Q965029|lt=Aki Province}} and {{ill|Suō Province|en|Suō Province|WD=Q1053037|lt=Suo Province}}. 

In the first year of {{ill|Jinki (era)|en|Jinki (era)|WD=Q1373210|lt=Shinki}} (724 CE), shortly after {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|WD=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu}} ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.

Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the {{ill|Man'yōshū|en|Man'yōshū|WD=Q834321|lt=Man'yōshū}}.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|WD=Q169134|lt=Nara City}}, Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>

== Career Timeline ==
* Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}}
* 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} (overstepping Ranks)
* 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}
* 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}}
* 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|en|Aki Province|WD=Q965029|lt=Aki Province}} and {{ill|Suō Province|en|Suō Province|WD=Q1053037|lt=Suo Province}}; served as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|en|Bizen Province|WD=Q1053688|lt=Bizen Province}}
* 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}}
* 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}
* Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan (Magistrate)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller)

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a {{ill|Nobility|en|Nobility|WD=Q134737|lt=noble}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period}}. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller).

== Career ==
In the {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō}} era under {{ill|Empress Genmei|en|Empress Genmei|WD=Q233224|lt=Empress Genmei}}, Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily:
- Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE.
- Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|WD=Q235343|lt=Empress Genshō}}.

While serving as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|en|Bizen Province|WD=Q1053688|lt=Bizen Province}} in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|en|Aki Province|WD=Q965029|lt=Aki Province}} and {{ill|Suō Province|en|Suō Province|WD=Q1053037|lt=Suo Province}}. 

In the first year of {{ill|Jinki (era)|en|Jinki (era)|WD=Q1373210|lt=Shinki}} (724 CE), shortly after {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|WD=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu}} ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.

Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the {{ill|Man'yōshū|en|Man'yōshū|WD=Q834321|lt=Man'yōshū}}.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|WD=Q169134|lt=Nara City}}, Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>

* 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} (overstepping Ranks)
* 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}
* 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}}

* 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}}
* 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}
* Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan (Magistrate)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller)

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a {{ill|Nobility|en|Nobility|WD=Q134737|lt=noble|1=Nobility}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period|1=Nara period}}. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller).

== Career ==
In the {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō|1=Wadō (era)}} era under {{ill|Empress Genmei|en|Empress Genmei|WD=Q233224|lt=Empress Genmei|1=Empress Genmei}}, Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily:
- Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE.
- Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|WD=Q235343|lt=Empress Genshō|1=Empress Genshō}}.

While serving as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|en|Bizen Province|WD=Q1053688|lt=Bizen Province|1=Bizen Province}} in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|en|Aki Province|WD=Q965029|lt=Aki Province|1=Aki Province}} and {{ill|Suō Province|en|Suō Province|WD=Q1053037|lt=Suo Province|1=Suō Province}}. 

In the first year of {{ill|Jinki (era)|en|Jinki (era)|WD=Q1373210|lt=Shinki|1=Jinki (era)}} (724 CE), shortly after {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|WD=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}} ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.

Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the {{ill|Man'yōshū|en|Man'yōshū|WD=Q834321|lt=Man'yōshū|1=Man'yōshū}}.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|WD=Q169134|lt=Nara City|1=Nara (city)}}, Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a {{ill|Nobility|en|Nobility|WD=Q134737|lt=noble|1=Nobility}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period|1=Nara period}}. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller).

== Career ==
In the {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō|1=Wadō (era)}} era under {{ill|Empress Genmei|en|Empress Genmei|WD=Q233224|lt=Empress Genmei|1=Empress Genmei}}, Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily:
- Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE.
- Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|WD=Q235343|lt=Empress Genshō|1=Empress Genshō}}.

While serving as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|en|Bizen Province|WD=Q1053688|lt=Bizen Province|1=Bizen Province}} in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|en|Aki Province|WD=Q965029|lt=Aki Province|1=Aki Province}} and {{ill|Suō Province|en|Suō Province|WD=Q1053037|lt=Suo Province|1=Suō Province}}. 

In the first year of {{ill|Jinki (era)|en|Jinki (era)|WD=Q1373210|lt=Shinki|1=Jinki (era)}} (724 CE), shortly after {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|WD=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}} ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.

Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the {{ill|Man'yōshū|en|Man'yōshū|WD=Q834321|lt=Man'yōshū|1=Man'yōshū}}.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|WD=Q169134|lt=Nara City|1=Nara (city)}}, Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>

== Career Timeline ==
* Date unknown: Appointed {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}}
* 708 CE (Wadō 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Ge|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} (overstepping Ranks)
* 712 CE (Wadō 5): Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}
* 715 CE (Wadō 8): Appointed {{ill|Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja|左衛士督|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sahashi no Toneri no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* 717 CE (Reiki 3): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Ge|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Ge|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}}
* 719 CE (Yōrō 3): Appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|en|Aki Province|WD=Q965029|lt=Aki Province|1=Aki Province}} and {{ill|Suō Province|en|Suō Province|WD=Q1053037|lt=Suo Province|1=Suō Province}}; served as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|en|Bizen Province|WD=Q1053688|lt=Bizen Province|1=Bizen Province}}
* 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}}
* 724 CE (Shinki 1): Promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}
* Date unknown: Held the post of {{ill|Benkan (Magistrate)|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan (Magistrate)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller)

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a {{ill|Nobility|en|Nobility|WD=Q134737|lt=noble|1=Nobility}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period|1=Nara period}}. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller).

== Career ==
In the {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō|1=Wadō (era)}} era under {{ill|Empress Genmei|en|Empress Genmei|WD=Q233224|lt=Empress Genmei|1=Empress Genmei}}, Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily:
- Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE.
- Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|WD=Q235343|lt=Empress Genshō|1=Empress Genshō}}.

While serving as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|en|Bizen Province|WD=Q1053688|lt=Bizen Province|1=Bizen Province}} in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|en|Aki Province|WD=Q965029|lt=Aki Province|1=Aki Province}} and {{ill|Suō Province|en|Suō Province|WD=Q1053037|lt=Suo Province|1=Suō Province}}. 

In the first year of {{ill|Jinki (era)|en|Jinki (era)|WD=Q1373210|lt=Shinki|1=Jinki (era)}} (724 CE), shortly after {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|WD=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}} ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.

Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the {{ill|Man'yōshū|en|Man'yōshū|WD=Q834321|lt=Man'yōshū|1=Man'yōshū}}.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|WD=Q169134|lt=Nara City|1=Nara (city)}}, Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a {{ill|Nobility|en|Nobility|WD=Q134737|lt=noble|1=Nobility}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period|1=Nara period}}. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller).

== Career ==
In the {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō|1=Wadō (era)}} era under {{ill|Empress Genmei|en|Empress Genmei|WD=Q233224|lt=Empress Genmei|1=Empress Genmei}}, Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily:
- Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE.
- Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|WD=Q235343|lt=Empress Genshō|1=Empress Genshō}}.

While serving as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|en|Bizen Province|WD=Q1053688|lt=Bizen Province|1=Bizen Province}} in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|en|Aki Province|WD=Q965029|lt=Aki Province|1=Aki Province}} and {{ill|Suō Province|en|Suō Province|WD=Q1053037|lt=Suo Province|1=Suō Province}}. 

In the first year of {{ill|Jinki (era)|en|Jinki (era)|WD=Q1373210|lt=Shinki|1=Jinki (era)}} (724 CE), shortly after {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|WD=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}} ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.

Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the {{ill|Man'yōshū|en|Man'yōshū|WD=Q834321|lt=Man'yōshū|1=Man'yōshū}}.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|WD=Q169134|lt=Nara City|1=Nara (city)}}, Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a {{ill|Nobility|en|Nobility|WD=Q134737|lt=noble|1=Nobility}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period|1=Nara period}}. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller).

== Career ==
In the {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō|1=Wadō (era)}} era under {{ill|Empress Genmei|en|Empress Genmei|WD=Q233224|lt=Empress Genmei|1=Empress Genmei}}, Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily:
- Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE.
- Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|WD=Q235343|lt=Empress Genshō|1=Empress Genshō}}.

While serving as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|en|Bizen Province|WD=Q1053688|lt=Bizen Province|1=Bizen Province}} in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|en|Aki Province|WD=Q965029|lt=Aki Province|1=Aki Province}} and {{ill|Suō Province|en|Suō Province|WD=Q1053037|lt=Suo Province|1=Suō Province}}. 

In the first year of {{ill|Jinki (era)|en|Jinki (era)|WD=Q1373210|lt=Shinki|1=Jinki (era)}} (724 CE), shortly after {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|WD=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}} ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.

Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the {{ill|Man'yōshū|en|Man'yōshū|WD=Q834321|lt=Man'yōshū|1=Man'yōshū}}.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|WD=Q169134|lt=Nara City|1=Nara (city)}}, Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>

* 720 CE (Yōrō 4): Promoted to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}}

'''Ōtomo no Sukunamaro''' (大伴 宿奈麻呂) was a {{ill|Nobility|en|Nobility|WD=Q134737|lt=noble|1=Nobility}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} of the early {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period|1=Nara period}}. He was the third son of {{ill|Otomo no Otomaro|ja|大伴安麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Yasumaro|qq=}}. His court Rank was {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}, and he served as {{ill|Benkan|ja|弁官|1=benkan|lt=Benkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3270768}} (Right Major Controller).

== Career ==
In the {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō|1=Wadō (era)}} era under {{ill|Empress Genmei|en|Empress Genmei|WD=Q233224|lt=Empress Genmei|1=Empress Genmei}}, Sukunamaro was promoted three Ranks from {{ill|Jurokui|ja|従六位上|1=Junior Sixth Rank|lt=Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jurokui|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従六位}} to {{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 708 CE. Over the next years, his career progressed steadily:
- Promoted to {{ill|Jugo-i no Jō|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 712 CE.
- Advanced to {{ill|Shogo-i|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 717 CE and to {{ill|Shogo-i no Jō|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogo-i no Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in 720 CE under {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|WD=Q235343|lt=Empress Genshō|1=Empress Genshō}}.

While serving as Governor of {{ill|Bizen Province|en|Bizen Province|WD=Q1053688|lt=Bizen Province|1=Bizen Province}} in 719 CE, he was concurrently appointed Inspector of {{ill|Aki Province|en|Aki Province|WD=Q965029|lt=Aki Province|1=Aki Province}} and {{ill|Suō Province|en|Suō Province|WD=Q1053037|lt=Suo Province|1=Suō Province}}. 

In the first year of {{ill|Jinki (era)|en|Jinki (era)|WD=Q1373210|lt=Shinki|1=Jinki (era)}} (724 CE), shortly after {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|WD=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}} ascended the throne, he was promoted to {{ill|Jushi-i|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jushi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He is believed to have passed away around 727 CE.

Sukunamaro's poetry includes love songs addressed to a court lady, with two of his poems preserved in the {{ill|Man'yōshū|en|Man'yōshū|WD=Q834321|lt=Man'yōshū|1=Man'yōshū}}.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poems=532, 533}}</ref> According to a later entry in the same collection, he resided in Tamura-ri (modern-day {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|WD=Q169134|lt=Nara City|1=Nara (city)}}, Nitatsujichō) and held the post of Right Major Controller.<ref>{{Cite Man'yōshū|volume=4|poem=759}}</ref>
